description: Tasks rewritten to match actual generated data

tasks.instruction: Register with the cheapest available 3-day in‑person member conference pass that costs no more than $600 and add exactly one workshop from the first conference day priced at or under $150, choosing the cheapest option that meets these criteria.
tasks.name: Register with the cheapest available 3-day in‑person member conference pass that costs no more than $600 and add exactly one workshop from the first conference day priced at or under $150, choosing the cheapest option that meets these criteria.
tasks.description: Register with the cheapest available 3-day in‑person member conference pass that costs no more than $600 and add exactly one workshop from the first conference day priced at or under $150, choosing the cheapest option that meets these criteria.

tasks.instruction: Add two intermediate-level afternoon sessions from the first conference day, one keynote that starts at 9:00 AM on the second day, and one networking session that starts after 5:00 PM on the third day to your personal schedule.

target_names: Improving Care Pathways with Predictive Analytics
Keynote: The Future of Learning Health Systems

tasks.name: Add two intermediate-level afternoon sessions from the first conference day, one keynote that starts at 9:00 AM on the second day, and one networking session that starts after 5:00 PM on the third day to your personal schedule.
tasks.description: Add two intermediate-level afternoon sessions from the first conference day, one keynote that starts at 9:00 AM on the second day, and one networking session that starts after 5:00 PM on the third day to your personal schedule.

tasks.instruction: Bookmark all sessions on the second conference day that are in the clinical practice track and offer at least 1.5 CE credits each, so that three such sessions appear in your favorites list.

target_names: Measuring Outcomes in Chronic Disease Programs

tasks.name: Bookmark all sessions on the second conference day that are in the clinical practice track and offer at least 1.5 CE credits each, so that three such sessions appear in your favorites list.

tasks.instruction: Choose the cheapest hotel within 0.5 miles of the venue that costs at most $220 per night and includes breakfast, then start a reservation for a king room using any available conference rate for a three‑night stay covering all main conference days.
tasks.name: Choose the cheapest hotel within 0.5 miles of the venue that costs at most $220 per night and includes breakfast, then start a reservation for a king room using any available conference rate for a three‑night stay covering all main conference days.
tasks.description: Choose the cheapest hotel within 0.5 miles of the venue that costs at most $220 per night and includes breakfast, then start a reservation for a king room using any available conference rate for a three‑night stay covering all main conference days.

tasks.instruction: Select the least expensive sponsorship package under $3,000 that includes both website logo placement and an exhibit table, then begin filling out the sponsor interest form with your contact and organization details.
tasks.name: Select the least expensive sponsorship package under $3,000 that includes both website logo placement and an exhibit table, then begin filling out the sponsor interest form with your contact and organization details.
tasks.description: Select the least expensive sponsorship package under $3,000 that includes both website logo placement and an exhibit table, then begin filling out the sponsor interest form with your contact and organization details.

tasks.instruction: From the exhibitor directory, filter to the data analytics category and companies indicating job opportunities, then add the first two exhibitors in alphabetical order to your visit list.
tasks.name: From the exhibitor directory, filter to the data analytics category and companies indicating job opportunities, then add the first two exhibitors in alphabetical order to your visit list.
tasks.description: From the exhibitor directory, filter to the data analytics category and companies indicating job opportunities, then add the first two exhibitors in alphabetical order to your visit list.

tasks.instruction: RSVP to one free evening social event starting after 6:00 PM on the second conference day and one paid networking lunch on the third day that costs less than $40, adding both to your schedule.
tasks.name: RSVP to one free evening social event starting after 6:00 PM on the second conference day and one paid networking lunch on the third day that costs less than $40, adding both to your schedule.
tasks.description: RSVP to one free evening social event starting after 6:00 PM on the second conference day and one paid networking lunch on the third day that costs less than $40, adding both to your schedule.

tasks.instruction: In your profile settings, set your dietary preference to vegetarian, choose leadership as your preferred conference track, and opt in to SMS text alerts, adding a mobile number if required.
tasks.name: In your profile settings, set your dietary preference to vegetarian, choose leadership as your preferred conference track, and opt in to SMS text alerts, adding a mobile number if required.
tasks.description: In your profile settings, set your dietary preference to vegetarian, choose leadership as your preferred conference track, and opt in to SMS text alerts, adding a mobile number if required.

tasks.instruction: From the conference shuttle schedule, add the first venue‑to‑airport departure on the final conference day that leaves after 3:00 PM to your trip plan.
